title: On load, the first viewport shows Ridge brand chrome, mission/clock bento cells, and the hero visual plane (marketing scroll mode)
After opening Events Manager (from View all events or equivalent), at least 6 seeded events are visible with titles
After creating an event titled 'Harbor Builder Summit' with a valid date, the text 'Harbor Builder Summit' is visible in the events list
After adding 3 new events on top of the seed set, the events list shows exactly 3 more rows than the initial seeded count
After filtering events by status (e.g. upcoming) with mixed statuses present, only matching events remain visible
After editing an event title to 'Evening Validator Meetup', the text 'Evening Validator Meetup' is visible and the previous title is not
After deleting an event, that event title is no longer visible in the events list
After deleting all events, an empty state is visible in Events Manager
After submitting create with an empty required event title, the events count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After switching between Marketing Scroll mode and Events Manager mode, the main canvas shows the other mode without full page navigation
After clicking the sun/moon theme toggle, surfaces recolor between light and dark without reload
When hovering notched CTAs, event rows, or interactive tiles, a visible hover wash, brightness, or arrow nudge appears
On desktop width, scrolling Why Ridge pins pillars into a progressive sticky stack (or reduced-motion/mobile shows the vertical-list fallback)
